description: Seed publishes a snapshot, then replace=true HEADS withdraws the old root set before the seed asks for the stale snapshot again
notes: Simulator uses a snapshot-capable seed so the normal transcript advertises a snapshot via SNAPSHOT_OFFER before the fault is injected.
The injected replace=true HEADS should withdraw the old root set so a later WANT for the stale snapshot object is rejected as unreachable from accepted sync roots.
